results.title: SEBI New Rules on Mutual Funds: All schemes divided into 5 categories; 41 schemes of one category closed | EXPLAINED
results.description: SEBI New Rules on Mutual Funds: To keep up with the dynamic investment environment and the opportunities that are emerging across asset classes, SEBI has now replaced Clause 2.6 with a new framework for the categorisation and streamlining of mutual fund schemes.
